payload.context: Chen Mo confirms to Jiang Taichu that he has collected all five fragments.

payload.description: The mysterious old man who has been searching for Jiang Taichu for many years, and found him too late. He is still searching.
payload.context: Chen Mo raises the topic of the old man who has been searching for Jiang Taichu.
Jiang Taichu reveals the old man found him too late because he had already lost four emotions.
Chen Mo confirms he has lost two emotions: fear and anger.
Jiang Taichu reveals that when the decision came, he chose to walk until he could go no further.
The lamp emitted an extremely faint fluctuation when Jiang Taichu spoke about deciding to continue or stop, suggesting it is listening and has awareness of the host's choice.
Jiang Taichu tells Chen Mo he still has time to decide whether to continue walking the path or stop. Chen Mo does not give an answer. The lamp wants to know too.

attributes.name: 姜太初
attributes.appearance: gray-robed, white-haired old man, sits on the ground

attributes.name: 神秘老人
attributes.description: An old man who has been searching for Jiang Taichu for many years; found him too late; is still searching

attributes.name: 灯
attributes.note: Reacted to Jiang Taichu's words about the decision, wants to know what the current host will choose

attributes.name: 穹顶
attributes.description: A dome space with a stone platform carved with ancient patterns, lit by white light

scenes.summary: Chen Mo and Jiang Taichu sit facing each other at the stone platform under the dome. Jiang Taichu asks about the fragments, and Chen Mo confirms he has all five. Chen Mo mentions the mysterious old man who has been searching for Jiang Taichu.

Jiang Taichu reveals he has lost four emotions: fear, anger, joy, sorrow. He asks Chen Mo how many he has lost. Chen Mo says two: fear and anger. Jiang Taichu tells Chen Mo he still has time to decide whether to continue or stop.

The lamp reacts to Jiang Taichu's words with a faint fluctuation. Chen Mo wonders what Jiang Taichu decided. Jiang Taichu says he decided to walk until he could go no further, but tells Chen Mo he does not need to walk the same path. Chen Mo does not give his answer.

summary_text: Chen Mo and Jiang Taichu sit across from each other at the stone platform under the dome. Jiang Taichu asks how many fragments Chen Mo collected; Chen Mo confirms all five. Chen Mo brings up the mysterious old man who has been searching for Jiang Taichu and found him too late. Jiang Taichu reveals he lost four emotions—fear, anger, joy, sorrow—and that the old man was right: it was already too late. Jiang Taichu asks Chen Mo how many emotions he has lost; Chen Mo says two: fear and anger. Jiang Taichu tells Chen Mo he still has time to decide whether to continue walking the path or stop. The lamp emits a faint fluctuation, reacting to the conversation. Chen Mo silently wonders what Jiang Taichu decided. Jiang Taichu says he decided to walk until he could go no further, but tells Chen Mo he does not need to walk the same path. Chen Mo does not give his answer. The lamp glows quietly, as if it also wants to know what this host will choose.
